name: North
subtitle: Dopamine Detox & Streak Tracker
description: A privacy-first dopamine detox app built after the market leader suffered a massive data breach exposing 600,000 users' most sensitive personal data. North takes a different bet: your data never leaves your phone. Local-only storage, no backend, no servers to breach.
insight: Quittr, the market leader with $500K MRR, had a catastrophic breach in March 2026. 600,000 users' addiction recovery data was exposed publicly. The trust destruction was total — and Brainbuddy, the only backup player, is 14 years old with no marketing. The window was open. I built North in 7 days.
problem: People trying to break compulsive habits need a place to track their progress privately. Every existing app stores your most sensitive behavioral data on a server. For people trying to recover from addiction, that's a non-starter.
whatWasBuilt: Full iOS app with a 12-screen onboarding flow, streak tracking, urge logging with front camera option, mood/energy/focus check-ins, a dopamine recovery timeline, and a privacy dashboard showing users exactly where their data lives. Hard paywall: $9.99/week or $39.99/year.

name: AgentAI Tools
subtitle: AI Tools for Real Estate Agents
tagline: The AI stack for modern real estate agents.
description: A content site and digital product business targeting real estate agents adopting AI tools. 33 static pages optimized for search, a $49 prompt pack on Gumroad, and a fully autonomous social posting system that runs without me touching it.
insight: Real estate agents are being forced to adopt AI but don't know where to start. The market is massive, the tooling is fragmented, and nobody has built a clear resource. I saw a gap and built a content operation around it with recurring affiliate revenue baked in.
problem: Real estate agents are overwhelmed by the AI tooling landscape. They need curated, practical guidance — not another generic 'AI for business' site.
whatWasBuilt: 33-page static site on Vercel, a $49 AI prompt pack, and a fully automated social posting infrastructure using Playwright (no API costs). Twitter and Reddit run on a cron schedule. Affiliate revenue from Fireflies (20% recurring) and Homesage (40% recurring).

name: Apex
subtitle: AI Call Intelligence Platform
description: An AI call intelligence platform built for sales teams. Records, transcribes, and analyzes calls to surface objections, buying signals, and coaching opportunities — automatically. Being demoed internally at Earnest for a potential company-sponsored launch.
insight: Sales managers spend hours listening to call recordings looking for patterns. AI can do this in seconds and surface insights at a level no human can match at scale. Enterprise tooling exists (Gong, Chorus) but it's priced out of reach for mid-market teams.
problem: Sales managers can't listen to every call. The ones they miss often contain the most important signal — objections that keep repeating, deals that go cold without a clear reason.
whatWasBuilt: Full demo documentation, product architecture, and pitch deck. Demo MVP in progress. Targeting internal Earnest pitch as a company-adopted product.

name: Performance Buddy
subtitle: AI Powerlifting Coach via SMS
tagline: A coach in your pocket. No app required.
description: An AI-powered powerlifting coach delivered over SMS. Text your lifts, get back programming, form cues, and progression plans. No app to install, no account to create. Just text a number and get coached.
insight: Most lifters don't need another app — they need a coach. But real coaching is expensive and inaccessible. SMS removes all friction: everyone knows how to text, no install required, works on any phone.
problem: Powerlifters plateau because they don't have access to smart programming. Generic apps give you templates. A real coach gives you adaptive programming based on how you're actually performing.
whatWasBuilt: Concept and architecture complete. Phase 1 in progress: Twilio → Claude API → Supabase pipeline for stateful SMS coaching sessions.
